mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sf.function_id, sf.function_pid, sf. NAME, sf.sort FROM sys_user_role sr LEFT JOIN sys_role_function srf ON sr.role_id = srf.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_function sf ON srf.function_id = sf.function_id WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT function_id as functionId, NAME AS treeName, function_pid as functionPid, sort, data_type, menu_value, menu_type, manage_content FROM sys_function where is_valid = 0 ORDER BY function_pid asc, sort ASC
